channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] HALO: Hybrid Adaptive Latent Reasoning for Language Models
item.description: HALO: Hybrid Adaptive Latent Reasoning for Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] An Emergent Mirage: Is Emergent Misalignment and Realignment Indeed a Robust Phenomenon?
item.description: An Emergent Mirage: Is Emergent Misalignment and Realignment Indeed a Robust Phenomenon?

item.description: AgentKGV: Agentic LLM-RAG Framework with Two-Stage Training for the Fact Verification of Knowledge Graphs

item.description: PRecG: Legal Precedent Retrieval with Graph Neural Networks and Rhetorical Role Segmentation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Augmenting Fundamental Analysis with Large Language Models: A RAG-Based System for Generating Investor Briefs
item.description: Augmenting Fundamental Analysis with Large Language Models: A RAG-Based System for Generating Investor Briefs

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Complexity-Guided Component-wise Initialization for Language Model Pretraining
item.description: Complexity-Guided Component-wise Initialization for Language Model Pretraining

item.description: Letter Lemmatization: One-to-one and Banded RNNs for Reversing Character-Set Simplification and Abbreviation in Medieval Text

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Creativity, honesty and designed forgetting emerge in small hyperbolic language models
item.description: Creativity, honesty and designed forgetting emerge in small hyperbolic language models

item.description: Automatic Thematic Indexing of Large Literary Corpora: A Machine Learning Approach to Voltaire's Complete Works

item.description: Letting the Data Speak: Extracting Keywords from Crowdsourced Collections with AI

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] WILDTRACE: Benchmarking Natural Evidence Trails in Long-Context Reasoning
item.description: WILDTRACE: Benchmarking Natural Evidence Trails in Long-Context Reasoning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Towards Detecting Inconsistencies in End-to-end Generated TODs
item.description: Towards Detecting Inconsistencies in End-to-end Generated TODs

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DKCD: Domain Knowledge-Enhanced Causal Discovery from Unstructured Data
item.description: DKCD: Domain Knowledge-Enhanced Causal Discovery from Unstructured Data

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Deceptive Grounding: Entity Attribution Failure in Clinical Retrieval-Augmented Generation
item.description: Deceptive Grounding: Entity Attribution Failure in Clinical Retrieval-Augmented Generation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Self-Guided Test-Time Training for Long-Context LLMs
item.description: Self-Guided Test-Time Training for Long-Context LLMs

item.description: Test-Time Scaling for Small VLMs on Multilingual Visual MCQ

item.description: Normalisation-Based Likelihood Ratio Estimation for Forensic Authorship Verification

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FreyaTTS Technical Report
item.description: FreyaTTS Technical Report

item.description: Conceptual Networks for Cross-Linguistic Idiomatic Expressions:A Feature-Based Graph Approach

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Tokenizer Transplantation: Mitigating Autoregressive Collapse in Edge-Efficient Bengali ASR
item.description: Tokenizer Transplantation: Mitigating Autoregressive Collapse in Edge-Efficient Bengali ASR

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Toward Real-Time Sentence-Level Sign Language Translation
item.description: Toward Real-Time Sentence-Level Sign Language Translation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Task-Specific Multimodal Question Answering Agents via Confidence Calibration and Incremental Reasoning for QANTA 2026
item.description: Task-Specific Multimodal Question Answering Agents via Confidence Calibration and Incremental Reasoning for QANTA 2026

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Unified Approach to Interpreting Knowledge Distillation for Large Language Models via Interactions
item.description: A Unified Approach to Interpreting Knowledge Distillation for Large Language Models via Interactions

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Sticky Routing: Training MoE Models for Memory-Efficient Inference
item.description: Sticky Routing: Training MoE Models for Memory-Efficient Inference

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Training, Reading, and Editing Legible Transformers
item.description: Training, Reading, and Editing Legible Transformers

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Sensitivity-Aware Thresholding and Token Routing for Activation Sparsification in Large Language Models
item.description: Sensitivity-Aware Thresholding and Token Routing for Activation Sparsification in Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Phone Segmentation and Recognition through Phonological Activation Mapping
item.description: Phone Segmentation and Recognition through Phonological Activation Mapping

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] VTaMo: Video-Text Alignment Model for Sign Language Translation
item.description: VTaMo: Video-Text Alignment Model for Sign Language Translation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MedRealMM: A Real-World Multimodal Benchmark for Chinese Online Medical Consultation
item.description: MedRealMM: A Real-World Multimodal Benchmark for Chinese Online Medical Consultation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Unified Approach to Interpreting Knowledge Distillation for Large Language Models via Interactions
item.description: Researchers show knowledge distillation works by sparsifying interactions, proposing Complex Interaction Penalty loss to improve student model performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] iLENS: Interpretable LLM-Guided Mixture-of-Experts for Neuroimaging Survival Analysis
item.description: iLENS uses LLM-guided mixture-of-experts to predict Alzheimer's Disease conversion risk from neuroimaging data with interpretable clinical rationales.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Signed Symmetric Quantization for Few-Bit Integers
item.description: Signed symmetric quantization reduces few-bit quantization error by optimally assigning the extra negative representable value while maintaining symmetric quantization's efficiency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Sticky Routing: Training MoE Models for Memory-Efficient Inference
item.description: StickyMoE, a training method for MoE models, reduces expert switching by 60% with minimal perplexity loss, improving memory efficiency on edge devices.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reward Transport: Property Control in Flow Matching via Noise-Space Alignment
item.description: Reward Transport enables property-controlled molecular generation in flow matching by aligning noise-space coordinates with rewards via optimal transport at training time.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Director: Accelerating Distributed MoE Serving via Online Proactive Expert Placement
item.description: Director system uses prediction-driven online expert placement to reduce Mixture-of-Experts serving latency by 11-55%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LieBN: Batch Normalization over Lie Groups
item.description: LieBN provides a generalized batch normalization framework for manifold-valued data on Lie groups, tested across nine distinct geometries.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] HERO: A Heterogeneity-Aware Benchmark Library for Federated Continual Learning
item.description: HERO benchmark library for federated continual learning decouples task splits, client data distribution, and task ordering to enable standardized evaluation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DaDaDa: A Dataset for Data Pricing in Data Marketplaces
item.description: DaDaDa: A Dataset for Data Pricing in Data Marketplaces

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Accelerating GPU Inference of Large Language Models with Moderately Unstructured Sparse Weight Matrices
item.description: Accelerating GPU Inference of Large Language Models with Moderately Unstructured Sparse Weight Matrices

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Adaptive Bayes exactly tracks information over intrinsic time
item.description: Adaptive Bayes exactly tracks information over intrinsic time

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Prompt-Driven Exploration
item.description: Prompt-Driven Exploration

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] How are linear representations learned? Exact solutions to the dynamics of abstraction
item.description: How are linear representations learned? Exact solutions to the dynamics of abstraction

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Optimizing Against Safety Representations: Activation-Guided Adversarial Suffixes and the Geometry of Refusal
item.description: Optimizing Against Safety Representations: Activation-Guided Adversarial Suffixes and the Geometry of Refusal

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Pattern-Aware Graph Neural Networks for Handling Missing Data
item.description: Pattern-Aware Graph Neural Networks for Handling Missing Data

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Machine Learning Surrogate for Component Criticality Ranking in Interdependent Power-Communication Networks
item.description: A Machine Learning Surrogate for Component Criticality Ranking in Interdependent Power-Communication Networks

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SafeExplorer: An Unbiased Policy Gradient for Reinforcement Learning with Recovery Interventions
item.description: SafeExplorer: An Unbiased Policy Gradient for Reinforcement Learning with Recovery Interventions

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] BlockServe: Block-Grained Continuous Batching for High-Throughput Diffusion LLM Serving
item.description: BlockServe: Block-Grained Continuous Batching for High-Throughput Diffusion LLM Serving

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Eluna: An Agentic LLM System for Automating Warehouse Operations with Reasoning and Task Execution
item.description: Eluna: An Agentic LLM System for Automating Warehouse Operations with Reasoning and Task Execution

item.description: NL-PAC: Specification Ambiguity and Certified Minimax Risk Floors in LLM-Mediated Supervision

item.description: Federated Low-Rank Koopman Learning for Multivariate Time-Series Anomaly Detection in IoT Systems

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Optimal Top-$k$ Identification from Pairwise Comparisons
item.description: Optimal Top-$k$ Identification from Pairwise Comparisons
